name: Hecahands Mankibuel
text: If this card battles a monster, neither can be destroyed by that battle. You can only use each of the following effects of "Hecahands Mankibuel" once per turn. You can reveal this card in your hand; Fusion Summon 1 "Hecahands" Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck, using monsters from your hand or field, including this card in your hand. If an Illusion Fusion Monster(s) is sent to your GY, while this card is in your GY (except during the Damage Step): You can add this card to your hand.
